provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
This Order may be cited as the Pounds (Non-Application to Certain Townships) Order.

provisions.title: Non-application of Act
provisions.content:
2. Non-application of Act
The provisions of the Pounds Act specified in the first column of the Schedule hereto shall not apply within the limits of any city or township referred to in the second column of the said Schedule.
